positive: Minimalist forest creature gathering vibrant bioluminescent glow worms. A whimsical fox with flowing, stylized fur and large, gentle eyes, surrounded by oversized, abstract leaves and fantastical floral arrangements. The composition is symmetrical and centered, featuring strong silhouettes and clear contrast between deep indigo night hues and neon, glowing turquoise and yellow accents. Flat graphic style meets sophisticated detailed line art, suitable for screen printing on fabric. Ultra clean, high saturation, perfect symmetry, central focus, vector art quality.
negative: blurry, lowres, noise, text, watermark, signature, messy, dirty, artifacts, extra limbs, poorly drawn hands, asymmetrical, cartoon, photo, realistic, grayscale
